_comment: Edit-quality eval cases. Edit `source` to any local image; each case is one delta applied as both a TEMPLATE arm (package GenIntent.EDIT) and a RAW arm (instruction verbatim, no preservation scaffold).

cases.delta: make the cap and hoodie red
add a pair of small round black-rimmed eyeglasses on the fox's face
remove the speech bubble, leaving a clean background where it was
